calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order Confirming Distribution Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Oct-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian McCaffrey for Earl Lawrence, Jr. (Petitioner).

Mr. McCaffrey addressed the Family Law 1965 Child Support Order and stated that there is a final judgment/decree in that matter. The Court stated that there is no opposition and that it is inclined to grant the petition. The Petition for Order Confirming Distribution of Trust Asset was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Clauzel.

Petition For An Order Confirming Distribution Of Trust Assets.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Continued To Oct-09-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
